notes: Policy revision manifest for outlets that previously had exactly one verified exact safe Wikimedia/Commons source. New threshold allows one exact safe source for automatic hero-only import. reviewSummary.policy: One exact safe Wikimedia/Wikipedia/Commons/licensed/permission-granted outlet source is sufficient for automatic hero.webp import. Outlets with zero exact safe sources remain manual upload needed.
reviewSummary.notImported: This manifest is for dry-run validation only in this task; image import and metadata status promotion are intentionally deferred.
